# Karishma Bishnoi - Student Developer Portfolio

## About
Karishma Bishnoi is a B.Tech engineering student at AIT Pune and a passionate developer based in Pune, India. She specializes in C++, Competitive Programming, Web Development, and UI/UX Design.

## Skills
- **Languages & Tech**: C++, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- **Design Tools**: Figma, Canva
- **Core Focus**: Competitive Programming (Codeforces), Web Prototyping

## Projects
- **Smart Irrigation System**: An IoT prototype detecting soil moisture and pH levels.
- **Event Design & Management**: Created visual assets and flyers for college events like NEXT NICHE, CODEFT, and IPL auctions.
- **Portfolio**: This website, showcasing her ongoing projects and skills.

## Contact

- **GitHub**: [https://github.com/karishma-spec]
- **LinkedIn**: [https://www.linkedin.com/in/karishma-bishnoi-218290393/]

## Content Structure
- `/`: Main landing page with Hero, About, Skills, Projects, and Contact sections.
- `/resume`: Direct link to view/download resume.
